ab: Initu haw kita, ta! Malingatu tu kita.
en: Hello everyone. Here we go.

ab: Katemireng! Mitaung!
en: A: Please stand up! Salute!

ab: Kapah haw kisu pasevana’ay.
en: B: Hello.

ab: Kamaru’.
en: A: Please sit down.

ab: Kapah haw kamu alumanay! I nipicudad nu mita anini a remiad, a pasevana’ kaku i tamuwan tu ngangan nu kakaenan nu Pangcah.
ch: 大家好。今天老師要教大家食物的阿美語怎麼說。
en: Hello everyone. Today, I am going to teach you how to say the Ami language for food.

ab: Mavana’ tu haw kisu a mitengil tu suwal nu pasevana’ay?
en: A: Do you understand what the teacher says?

ab: Caay kava:na’ kaku a mitengil tu suwal nu misu pasevana’ay, kapah tu haw a kinacacay aca a miliyaw a semuwal?
ch: B:老師，我聽不懂。可以再說一次好嗎?
en: B: I don’t understand. Can you repeat it again?

ab: Caay pakatengil kaku, kapa:h tu haw a satataangen atu:di?
ch: B:我聽不到，可以大聲一點嗎
en: B:I can’t hear you, can you speak louder?

ab: Pimelawi itini! Duduen ku nipiasip nu maku.
ch: 請看這裡! 跟著我唸一遍。
en: Look here, please! Repeat after me.

ab: Hay! Kapah ku niasip nu misu.
en: It’s very well read.

ab: Kakinacacay aca a miasip, satataangen atudi.
en: Read it again. Please speak louder.

ab: Terep han, akaa kasemuwal.
en: Please be quiet. Don’t talk.

ab: Patahekalen ku cudad.
en: A: Please take out your textbook.

ab: Hay, pasevana’ay.
en: B: Yes, sir.

ab: Pasadaken ku sapisurit nu misu.
en: A: Please take out your pen.

ab: Pasevana’ay! Mapawan kaku a mikerid tu sapisurit nu maku.
en: B: I forgot to bring my pen.

ab: Patahkalen ku savuric.
en: A: Please take out the eraser.

ab: Pasevana’ay, mapawan kaku a mikerid tu savuric.
en: B: I forgot to bring my eraser.

ab: Picaliwi tu savuric nu teparay nu misu.
ch: A:請跟旁邊同學借橡皮擦。
en: A: Please borrow erasers from your classmates.

ab: Pacaliwi kaku tu savuric nu misu.
en: B: Can I borrow your eraser?

ab: Maherek tu ku nipicudad nu mita.
en: Class is over.

ab: Tangasa itini ku nipinanam nu mita, rumaaw tu a lipayan a malalitemuh.
ch: 我們就上到這邊，下週再見。
en: Class dismissed, see you next week.
